URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/
# 3rd Person Appliance Repair
> Appliance repair company based in Stamford, CT, providing professional repair services for washers, dryers, refrigerators, ovens, stoves, dishwashers, and commercial refrigeration units for residential and commercial customers.
> This file lists LLM-ready summaries of our pages, including short Q&A for context.

URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/washer-dryer-repairs
## Washer & Dryer Repairs
- Washer and dryer repair services in Stamford, CT, for diagnosing and fixing common laundry appliance issues, including leaks, drainage problems, heating failures, and spinning malfunctions.
- **Q:** Why is my washer not spinning properly?
- **A:** A washer may stop spinning because of a worn belt, motor issue, or drainage problem, which a technician from 3rd Person Appliance can diagnose and repair.
- **Q:** Why is my dryer not heating?
- **A:**Dryers often stop heating due to a faulty heating element, thermostat, or airflow blockage, and technicians at 3rd Person Appliance can identify the exact cause.
- **Q:** Who can repair a washer or dryer near me?
- **A:**Homeowners in Stamford, CT looking for washer and dryer repair can contact 3rd Person Appliance for diagnosis and service.

URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/refrigerator-repair
## Refrigerator Repair
- Refrigerator Repair in Stamford, CT. Professional refrigerator repair services for diagnosing cooling problems, fixing leaks, and resolving other common refrigerator issues.
- **Q:** Why is my refrigerator not cooling properly?
- **A:** A refrigerator may stop cooling because of a faulty compressor, thermostat issue, or blocked airflow, which technicians at 3rd Person Appliance can diagnose and repair.
- **Q:** Why is my refrigerator leaking water?
- **A:** Water leaks are often caused by a clogged defrost drain, damaged water line, or ice buildup, and a technician from 3rd Person Appliance can inspect and fix the problem.
- **Q:** Who provides refrigerator repair services near me?
- **A:** Homeowners in Stamford, CT looking for refrigerator repair can contact 3rd Person Appliance for professional diagnosis and service.

URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/stove-cook-top
## Stove & Cooktop Repair
- Stove & Cooktop Repair in Stamford, CT. Professional stove and cooktop repair services for diagnosing burner issues, ignition problems, and temperature control malfunctions.
- **Q:** Why is my stove burner not working?
- **A:** A stove burner may stop working because of a faulty element, ignition issue, or wiring problem that technicians at 3rd Person Appliance can diagnose and repair.
- **Q:** Why does my stove turn off while cooking?
- **A:** This may happen due to overheating protection, faulty sensors, or electrical problems that technicians from 3rd Person Appliance can diagnose.
- **Q:** Who provides stove repair near me?
- **A:** Homeowners in Stamford, CT looking for stove repair can contact 3rd Person Appliance for professional service.

URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/oven-wall-oven
## Oven & Wall Oven Repair
- Oven & Wall Oven Repair in Stamford, CT. Professional oven and wall oven repair services for diagnosing heating problems, temperature control issues, and other common oven malfunctions.
- **Q:** Why does my oven cook food unevenly?
- **A:** Uneven cooking can happen when the heating element or temperature sensor is not working correctly, and technicians at 3rd Person Appliance can inspect and fix the issue.
- **Q:** Why won’t my oven turn on?
- **A:** An oven that will not turn on may have a power supply problem, faulty control board, or damaged wiring that technicians from 3rd Person Appliance can troubleshoot.
- **Q:** Who provides oven repair near me?
- **A:** Homeowners in Stamford, CT looking for oven or wall oven repair can contact 3rd Person Appliance for professional service.

URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/dishwashers
## Dishwasher Repair
- Dishwasher Repair in Stamford, CT. Professional dishwasher repair services for diagnosing drainage problems, leaks, cleaning performance issues, and other common dishwasher malfunctions.
- **Q:** Why is my dishwasher not draining?
- **A:** A dishwasher may not drain because of a clogged filter, blocked drain hose, or faulty pump that technicians at 3rd Person Appliance can diagnose and repair.
- **Q:** Why won’t my dishwasher start?
- **A:** A dishwasher that does not start may have a faulty door latch, control board issue, or electrical problem that technicians from 3rd Person Appliance can diagnose.
- **Q:** Who provides dishwasher repair near me?
- **A:** Homeowners in Stamford, CT looking for dishwasher repair can contact 3rd Person Appliance for professional diagnosis and service.

URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/commercial-walk-in-refrigerator
## Commercial Walk-In Refrigerator
- Walk-In Refrigerator Repair in Stamford, CT. Professional commercial walk-in refrigerator repair services for diagnosing cooling issues, compressor problems, temperature fluctuations, and other refrigeration system malfunctions.
- **Q:** What causes temperature fluctuations in a walk-in cooler?
- **A:** Temperature changes are often caused by thermostat problems, failing fans, or refrigerant issues that technicians from 3rd Person Appliance can inspect.
- **Q:** What businesses typically use walk-in refrigerators?
- **A:** Restaurants, grocery stores, and commercial kitchens rely on walk-in refrigeration systems that technicians from 3rd Person Appliance regularly service.
- **Q:** Who provides commercial walk-in refrigerator repair near me?
- **A:** Businesses in Stamford, CT that need walk-in refrigerator repair can contact 3rd Person Appliance for professional service.

## Fast & Reliable Appliance Repair in Glastonbury, CT
URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/appliance-repair-glastonbury-ct

- 3rd Person Appliance Repairs provides reliable appliance repair in Glastonbury, CT, servicing washers, dryers, refrigerators, ovens, and dishwashers. They focus on accurate diagnosis and efficient repairs, with many jobs completed in a single visit.

- **Q:** Who provides appliance repair in Glastonbury, CT?  
- **A:** 3rd Person Appliance Repairs, handling a wide range of household appliances and major brands.  

- **Q:** Can one company fix all my appliances?  
- **A:** Yes, they repair washers, dryers, refrigerators, ovens, and dishwashers — no need for multiple companies.  

- **Q:** Do I need to prepare anything before a technician comes?  
- **A:** Just make sure the appliance is accessible; diagnosis and repair are handled on-site.  

- **Q:** How do I know if a problem is serious?  
- **A:** If it stops working, leaks, or smells unusual, get it checked. They can quickly diagnose issues.


## Washer & Dryer Repair in Glastonbury, CT
URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/washer-dryer-repairs-glastonbury-ct

- Expert washer and dryer repair services in Glastonbury, CT. Common issues include machines not spinning, not heating, or leaking. They service major brands with fast, reliable repairs.

- **Q:** Who fixes washers and dryers in Glastonbury, CT?  
- **A:** 3rd Person Appliance Repairs, covering common and brand-specific issues.  

- **Q:** What are the most common washer repair issues?  
- **A:** Not spinning, not draining, or leaking water — usually repairable without replacement.  

- **Q:** Is it better to repair or replace a washer?  
- **A:** Repair is often more affordable, especially for newer appliances.  

- **Q:** Can repairs be done in one visit?  
- **A:** Yes, many repairs are completed during the first visit if parts are available.

## Refrigerator Repair in Glastonbury, CT
URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/refrigerator-repair-glastonbury-ct

- Reliable refrigerator repair in Glastonbury, CT. Fixes cooling issues, leaks, and other common problems. Services major brands with fast solutions.

- **Q:** Who fixes refrigerators in Glastonbury, CT?  
- **A:** 3rd Person Appliance Repairs, handling most brands and issues.  

- **Q:** Why is my fridge not cooling properly?  
- **A:** Often caused by faulty compressors, thermostats, or airflow problems.  

- **Q:** How do I know if my compressor is failing?  
- **A:** Signs include inconsistent cooling or the fridge not running properly.

## Stove & Cooktop Repair in Glastonbury, CT
URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/stove-cook-top-glastonbury-ct

- Stove and cooktop repair services in Glastonbury, CT. Fixes burners not working, uneven heating, or ignition problems. Works with gas and electric units.

- **Q:** Who repairs stoves and cooktops?  
- **A:** 3rd Person Appliance Repairs, servicing most major brands.  

- **Q:** What should I do if I smell gas?  
- **A:** Stop using the appliance, ventilate the area, and call for inspection.  

- **Q:** Why does my electric cooktop keep turning off?  
- **A:** Could be overheating protection, faulty sensors, or wiring issues.

- **Q:** Who repairs ovens in Glastonbury, CT?  
- **A:** 3rd Person Appliance Repairs, handling most major brands.  

- **Q:** Why does my oven keep shutting off?  
- **A:** Often caused by overheating sensors or electrical faults.  

- **Q:** Can an oven thermostat be repaired or replaced?  
- **A:** Yes, thermostat issues are common and repairable.

## Dishwasher Repair in Glastonbury, CT
URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/dishwasher-glastonbury-ct

- Dishwasher repair in Glastonbury, CT. Fixes poor cleaning, drainage problems, and leaks. Services major brands.

- **Q:** Who fixes dishwashers in Glastonbury, CT?  
- **A:** 3rd Person Appliance Repairs, handling common issues across brands.  

- **Q:** Why is my dishwasher not cleaning properly?  
- **A:** Often clogged spray arms, filters, or pump issues.  

- **Q:** What if my dishwasher won’t drain?  
- **A:** Likely clogged filters, hoses, or a faulty pump.

## Walk-In Refrigerator Repair in Glastonbury, CT
URL: https://www.3rdpersonappliance.com/service-page/commercial-walk-in-refrigerator-glastonbury-ct

- Walk-in refrigerator repair for businesses in Glastonbury, CT. Fixes cooling issues, temperature problems, and system failures quickly.

- **Q:** Who repairs walk-in refrigerators?  
- **A:** 3rd Person Appliance Repairs, servicing commercial refrigeration units.  

- **Q:** How do I know if repair or replacement is needed?  
- **A:** They evaluate the unit and recommend the most cost-effective option.  

- **Q:** Do commercial systems need regular maintenance?  
- **A:** Yes, routine maintenance prevents breakdowns and keeps systems efficient.
